summary: Iteration 19 - V3 Correctifs Testing Complete. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (92%). Frontend: All V3 features verified. New features: water_data.py, road_data.py, suggestion pills, Street View/Satellite links, compare mode, water+road in scoring/PDF.

minor.issue: 502 timeout on external IGN API call (intermittent, external dependency)

passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (11/12) ===
GET /api/ returns API info (version 1.0.0)
GET /api/france/gpu-zones returns industrial zones array
POST /api/chat returns parcels with dist_cours_eau_m, nom_cours_eau, dist_route_m, nom_route, type_route fields
POST /api/chat parcels have score with score, verdict, detail (4 axes), flags, resume
POST /api/export/pdf returns valid PDF with water+road data
GET /api/map/electrical-assets returns 101+ postes HTB with S3REnR data
GET /api/map/dc returns 61 DC existants
GET /api/map/landing-points returns 8 landing points
GET /api/map/submarine-cables returns 15+ cables
GET /api/map/rte-future-400kv returns GeoJSON with line + buffers
GET /api/s3renr/summary returns region data (IDF SATURÉ, PACA ACTIF, HdF ACTIF)
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS ===
Login page loads correctly with Google Auth button
Dashboard loads with map showing all infrastructure layers
5 new layer toggles visible: Zones industrielles, Heatmap MW dispo, Zones inondables, Cours d'eau, Réseau routier
5 suggestion pills visible: PACA 2ha+, Fos-sur-Mer, Hauts-de-France, Score > 70, Grands terrains
Chatbot returns parcel results with ScoreBar components (RTE, MW, PLU, Surface)
Parcel cards show water info (Cours d'eau: X.Xkm) and road info (type_route: X.Xkm)
Parcel detail panel shows Satellite link (data-testid=satellite-link)
Parcel detail panel shows Street View link (data-testid=streetview-link)
Parcel detail panel shows Compare button (data-testid=compare-add-btn)
Compare bar appears when 2+ parcels added to compare list
PDF export button works (data-testid=export-pdf-btn)
S3REnR summary visible in sidebar (IDF: SATURÉ, PACA: ACTIF, HdF: ACTIF)
seed_data_creation: Created test user 'test-user-iteration19' with session for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified V3 correctifs. Key features verified: 1) water_data.py - get_nearest_water() via Overpass API returns dist_cours_eau_m, nom_cours_eau. 2) road_data.py - get_nearest_road() via Overpass API returns dist_route_m, nom_route, type_route. 3) Suggestion pills (5 pills) visible when messages.length <= 1. 4) Street View + Satellite links in ParcelDetail with data-testid. 5) Compare mode with compareList state (max 3 parcels), compare bar at bottom, compare modal table. 6) Water+road data integrated in scoring resume and PDF export. Chat endpoint may take 30-60s due to Overpass enrichment for top 5 parcels. All APIs are live (no mocked APIs).

v3_correctifs_verification.correctif_1_water_data: VERIFIED - water_data.py returns dist_cours_eau_m, nom_cours_eau via Overpass API
v3_correctifs_verification.correctif_2_road_data: VERIFIED - road_data.py returns dist_route_m, nom_route, type_route via Overpass API
v3_correctifs_verification.correctif_3_suggestion_pills: VERIFIED - 5 pills visible: PACA 2ha+, Fos-sur-Mer, Hauts-de-France, Score > 70, Grands terrains
v3_correctifs_verification.correctif_4_streetview_satellite: VERIFIED - Both links present in ParcelDetail with correct data-testid
v3_correctifs_verification.correctif_5_compare_mode: VERIFIED - Compare button, compare bar, compare modal all working
v3_correctifs_verification.correctif_6_water_road_in_scoring: VERIFIED - Water/road data shown in parcel cards and included in PDF export

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - Water and road data use Overpass API (real OSM data). DVF uses Cerema API with dept/region fallback.
